title: rclaude project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for rclaude sessions. Place at .rclaude/rclaude.json in your project root.

permissions.description: Auto-approve rules for Write/Edit/Read permission requests on protected directories (.claude/, .git/, etc). All other tool permissions are handled by Claude Code's own permission system.

allow.description: Glob patterns matching file paths. Relative patterns match against the project root. Absolute patterns (starting with /) match against the full file path. Use ** for recursive directory matching. Example: .claude/docs/** allows all files under .claude/docs/
